title: Admin Actions Menu Consolidation
description:
Consolidate admin action buttons (Sync remote DB, Reload config, Reload localisations) into a unified Actions dropdown menu with a cog/gear icon highlighting. Add new Reindex all action.

Implementation steps:
1. Identify current action buttons in adminLayout.ftl (lines 189-203)
2. Create dropdown menu structure using Bootstrap dropdown component
3. Move existing actions into submenu items
4. Add distinctive styling with cog/gear icon
5. Add new Reindex all action endpoint
6. Style the dropdown for visual prominence

Verification/Test steps:
1. Verify Actions menu appears in admin navbar
2. Test Sync remote DB action works from dropdown
3. Test Reload config action works from dropdown
4. Test Reload localisations action works from dropdown
5. Test Reindex all action triggers reindexing
6. Verify dropdown styling is visually distinct

title: Create Actions dropdown menu in adminLayout.ftl
description:
Replace individual action buttons with a consolidated Actions dropdown menu in the admin navbar.

Implementation steps:
1. Open src/main/resources/templates/adminLayout.ftl
2. Locate existing action buttons (Sync remote DB link, Reload config form, Reload localisations form) around lines 189-203
3. Create Bootstrap dropdown structure with button trigger and dropdown-menu
4. Use cog/gear icon (fas fa-cog) for the dropdown toggle button
5. Add btn-warning or custom highlight class for visual prominence
6. Move Sync remote DB as first dropdown item (conditional on _isRemoteDbConfigured)
7. Move Reload config as second dropdown item with form submission via JavaScript
8. Move Reload localisations as third dropdown item with form submission via JavaScript
9. Add dropdown-divider before dangerous actions if needed
10. Ensure CSRF tokens are properly handled in form submissions

Verification/Test steps:
1. Build application: ./gradlew clean build -x test
2. Start application: ./gradlew bootRun --args='--spring.profiles.active=local'
3. Navigate to http://localhost:8080/admin
4. Verify Actions dropdown button appears with cog icon
5. Click dropdown and verify all items appear
6. Test Sync remote DB item (if configured)
7. Test Reload config item - verify config reloads
8. Test Reload localisations item - verify localisations reload
9. Verify dropdown closes after action

title: Add Reindex all action to Actions menu
description:
Add a new Reindex all action to the Actions dropdown menu that triggers search index rebuild in background.

Implementation steps:
1. Create new admin controller endpoint for reindex action in existing admin controller or new AdminActionsController.kt
2. Add POST /admin/actions/reindex endpoint
3. Inject SearchIndexer service into the controller
4. Call searchIndexer.reindexAll() asynchronously using @Async or coroutines
5. Return immediate response with message 'Reindexing started in background'
6. Add Reindex all dropdown item in adminLayout.ftl Actions menu
7. Use form with POST method for the action (CSRF protection)
8. Add appropriate icon (fas fa-search or fas fa-sync)
9. Add logging for reindex start/completion

Verification/Test steps:
1. Build application: ./gradlew clean build -x test
2. Start application with local profile
3. Navigate to http://localhost:8080/admin
4. Open Actions dropdown menu
5. Click Reindex all action
6. Verify success message or redirect
7. Check application logs for reindex start message
8. Verify search functionality works after reindex
9. Test search for articles/products to confirm index is populated

title: Product Page Icon Consistency
description:
Fix inconsistently-sized bullet/check icons in product sales page for 'Prakticky pruvodce spankem'. Icons in article body lists appear at different sizes.

Implementation steps:
1. Analyze CSS styling for check icons in article body
2. Identify the source of size inconsistency
3. Standardize icon sizes across all list items
4. Test on actual product page

Verification/Test steps:
1. View http://localhost:8080/produkt/prakticky-pruvodce-hlubokym-spankem
2. Compare screenshots with PRPs/improvements_2026_01_11/small_bullets.png
3. Verify all bullet icons have consistent size
4. Verify icons are properly aligned with text

title: Fix check icon sizes in article body lists
description:
Fix inconsistently-sized check/bullet icons in Co konkretne ziskate section of product page article body.

Implementation steps:
1. Navigate to article edit page to see article content
2. Inspect the HTML structure of the check icon list items in browser dev tools
3. Identify if icons are SVG, font-awesome, or image-based
4. Check CSS classes applied to icons in article body styling
5. Find CSS file responsible - likely new-design-styles.css, new-components.css or sales-styles.css
6. Add or modify CSS rules to ensure consistent icon size
7. Ensure vertical alignment is correct with text
8. Run CSS minification with gradlew minifyCss

Verification/Test steps:
1. Build CSS with gradlew minifyCss
2. Refresh product page
3. Compare with screenshot in PRPs folder
4. Verify all check icons in list section are same size
5. Verify icons align properly with first line of text
6. Check responsiveness on different screen sizes

title: Fix icon sizes in Predstavte si section
description:
Fix inconsistent icon sizes in Predstavte si jake to bude az section with moon, sun, heart icons.

Implementation steps:
1. Locate productSalesPage.ftl template section around lines 219-250
2. Check icon classes like icon w-8 h-8 text-gentle-red mt-1
3. Verify icon-moon, icon-sun, icon-heart SVG symbols in iconSprite.ftl
4. Ensure all icons use consistent size classes w-8 h-8
5. Check if nested icons cause size issues
6. Add CSS fixes if needed for consistent sizing
7. Verify proper viewBox attributes in SVG symbols

Verification/Test steps:
1. Refresh product page
2. Compare with screenshot PRPs/improvements_2026_01_11/small_bullets2.png
3. Verify moon, sun, heart icons all appear same size
4. Verify icons align properly with headings
5. Test on mobile viewport

title: Testimonial Carousel Styling
description:
Improve testimonial carousel navigation dots styling. Current dots are elliptical with unattractive shadow borders. Make them round with subtle shadows.

Implementation steps:
1. Identify testimonial dot CSS in sales-styles.css
2. Modify dot styling for perfect circles
3. Improve shadow/border styling

Verification/Test steps:
1. View product page with testimonials
2. Compare with PRPs/improvements_2026_01_11/testimonial_carousel.png
3. Verify dots are perfectly round
4. Verify shadow is subtle and attractive

title: Fix testimonial carousel navigation dots
description:
Make testimonial carousel navigation dots perfectly round with more subtle shadow borders.

Implementation steps:
1. Open src/main/resources/static/css/sales-styles.css
2. Find .testimonial-dot class around line 259
3. Current styling uses w-3 h-3 rounded-full in template
4. Ensure aspect-ratio 1/1 for perfect circle
5. Modify box-shadow to be more subtle
6. Remove any border that causes elliptical appearance
7. Consider using outline instead of box-shadow if needed
8. Run gradlew minifyCss to rebuild styles.css

Verification/Test steps:
1. Build CSS with gradlew minifyCss
2. Navigate to product page with testimonials
3. Compare dots with PRPs/improvements_2026_01_11/testimonial_carousel.png
4. Verify dots are perfectly circular not elliptical
5. Verify shadow is subtle and looks professional
6. Test dot hover and active states
7. Test on different browsers

Fix inconsistently-sized bullet/check icons in product sales page for 'Prakticky pruvodce spankem'. Icons in article body lists appear at different sizes.

Implementation steps:
1. Analyze CSS styling for check icons in article body
2. Identify the source of size inconsistency
3. Standardize icon sizes across all list items
4. Test on actual product page

Verification/Test steps:
1. View http://localhost:8080/produkt/prakticky-pruvodce-hlubokym-spankem
2. Compare screenshots with PRPs/improvements_2026_01_11/small_bullets.png
3. Verify all bullet icons have consistent size
4. Verify icons are properly aligned with text

title: Testimonial Carousel Styling
description:
Improve testimonial carousel navigation dots styling. Current dots are elliptical with unattractive shadow borders. Make them round with subtle shadows.

Implementation steps:
1. Identify testimonial dot CSS in sales-styles.css
2. Modify dot styling for perfect circles
3. Improve shadow/border styling

Verification/Test steps:
1. View product page with testimonials
2. Compare with PRPs/improvements_2026_01_11/testimonial_carousel.png
3. Verify dots are perfectly round
4. Verify shadow is subtle and attractive
